2605.23780.title: Beyond Binary Edits Robust Multimodal Knowledge Editing with Adversarial Subspace Alignment
2605.23780.paper_summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) need efficient mechanisms to update knowledge without degrading existing capabilities. While intrinsic multimodal knowledge editing achieves strong reliability and locality, it often exhibits limited generality, failing to propagate edits across semantically equivalent visual and linguistic variations. This issue arises from the lack of explicit semantic supervision, rigid editing scopes, and biased anchoring to individual samples in high-dimensional multimodal spaces. We address robust intrinsic multimodal knowledge editing by explicitly targeting generalization. We formalize robustness through knowledge units that group semantically equivalent multimodal inputs and define generality as consistent predictions within each unit. To expose fragile semantic regions, we introduce Latent Adversarial Robustification (LAR), which generates adversarial yet semantically coherent variants in the joint latent space. We further propose Rank-Constrained Subspace Learning (RCSL), enforcing low-rank alignment of adversarial representations at the edit layer via a singular value-based objective. Extensive analysis demonstrates the effectiveness of ASAM empirically.
2605.23780.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 需要有效的機制來更新知識，而不會降低現有的能力。雖然內在的多模態知識編輯實現了強大的可靠性和局部性，但它往往表現出有限的普遍性，無法在語義上等效的視覺和語言變化中傳播編輯。這一問題源於缺乏明確的語義監督、僵化的編輯範圍以及在高維多模態空間中對個別樣本的偏見錨定。我們通過明確針對泛化來解決穩健的內在多模態知識編輯。我們通過知識單元來形式化穩健性，這些單元將語義上等效的多模態輸入分組，並將普遍性定義為每個單元內的一致預測。為了揭示脆弱的語義區域，我們引入了潛在對抗穩健化 (LAR)，該方法在聯合潛在空間中生成對抗性但語義上連貫的變體。我們進一步提出了秩約束子空間學習 (RCSL)，通過基於奇異值的目標在編輯層強制對抗表示的低秩對齊。廣泛的分析實證證明了ASAM的有效性。
2605.23780.author: Haoyuan Wang et.al.
2605.23780.authors: Haoyuan Wang, Xiaohao Liu, Jiajie Su, Jianmao Xiao, Chaochao Chen
